case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. SURETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SURETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REIMBURSEMENT FROM CCSF FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SURETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,300.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
